subject: [PATCH v1 1/9] fuse: separate next request fetching from sending logic

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch separates the logic of fetching and sending the next request in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) implementation from the io_uring interface. The duplicated logic in fuse_uring_send_next_to_ring() is removed, decoupling request fetching from the send operation. This simplifies the control flow and reduces unnecessary parameter passing.
